title: Have your say on proposed green belt development | Gareth Bacon
meta_description: Have your say on proposed green belt development in St Mary Cray.
headings: h2: PROPOSED GREEN BELT DEVELOPMENT IN ST MARY CRAY
text_excerpt: --> Have your say on proposed green belt development | Gareth Bacon top of page Home Meet Gareth Election 2024 News More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. PROPOSED GREEN BELT DEVELOPMENT IN ST MARY CRAY Land Improvement Holdings have begun a publication exercise with local people, showcasing a housing development they would like to undertake in St Mary Cray. If they achieve planning permission, they aim to build approximately 350 units on farming land south of Crockenhill Road. To be clear, the site on which they wish to build is green belt land. A development of this nature will fundamentally change the look and feel of the area. Furthermore, if such a development is allowed to proceed, it may lead to more and more development in the green belt. Everyone is in agreement that we need more homes, but they must be built in the right places. Unfortunately, the government wants to make it easier to build on green belt land. But our green belt is precious, it is what makes Orpington such a beautiful and sustainable place to live, and if we allow it to be concreted over, it will be gone forever. No planning application has yet been submitted for this proposal, but one is expected in the near future, possibly as soon as Spring 2025. Please spare a few minutes to let me know your thoughts on this site by responding to the survey below. Thank you. Have your say Your First Name Your Last Name Your Email Your Address Do you think we should build homes on green belt land? Yes No Do you think we have the infrastructure to cope with hundreds of new homes in St Mary Cray? Yes No Do you believe that a development of approximately 350 units will change the look and feel of the area? Yes No Do you think we need to build more homes in St Mary Cray? Yes No If a planning application is submitted for this proposed development in St Mary Cray, should it be approved by the local authority? Yes No The government wants to reclassify parts of green belt land into so-called “grey belt” land so it is easier to build on. Should this be allowed to happen? Yes No Thinking of St Mary Cray and the wider Orpington constituency, where do you think new homes should be built? Is there anything else you would like to add regarding this proposed development or the green belt? I want to subscribe Gareth Bacon MP's newsletter. Submit Your answers have been submitted. Thank you for taking part.
